content: Defender Tommy Smith, whose club Braintree Town were relegated from the National League this season, is named in New Zealand's World Cup squad.

zh.title: 布林特里队员史密斯入选新西兰世界杯球队
zh.summary: 尽管俱乐部本赛季从英甲降级，布林特里城后卫汤米·史密斯已被列入新西兰世界杯球队名单。这一选择展现了他在国际舞台上的实力。

title: Hall, 18, becomes youngest to score MLS hat-trick
summary: Red Bull New York forward Julian Hall made MLS history by becoming the youngest player ever to score a hat-trick in the league, achieving the feat in a win over Columbus Crew. The milestone represents a significant achievement for the young talent.
content: Forward Julian Hall makes MLS history by becoming the youngest player to score a hat-trick in Red Bull New York's win over Columbus Crew.

zh.title: 18岁的霍尔成为MLS最年轻的帽子戏法得分者
zh.summary: 纽约红牛前锋朱利安·霍尔创造MLS历史，成为联赛历史上最年轻的帽子戏法得分者，在对阵哥伦布客队的胜利中完成了这一壮举。这一里程碑对这位年轻天才来说是一项重大成就。

title: Captain Gorry to leave West Ham
summary: West Ham captain Katrina Gorry will leave the club when her contract expires next month, reflecting on her captaincy as "the greatest honour." The departure marks the end of a significant chapter in her career with the club.
content: Katrina Gorry, who will leave West Ham when her contract expires next month, says captaining the side has been "the greatest honour".

zh.title: 队长戈里将离开西汉姆
zh.summary: 西汉姆队长卡特里娜·戈里将在下个月合同到期时离开俱乐部，她将队长职位称为"最大的荣誉"。她的离开标志着她在俱乐部职业生涯重要篇章的结束。

title: Louie Barry - Barcelona to Wembley via nine loans
summary: The career of "wonderkid" Louie Barry has taken him from Barcelona through nine loan spells to a second Wembley final appearance. His journey illustrates the unpredictable path of young talents in modern football.
content: From Barcelona to Stockport and a second Wembley final - the rollercoaster career of "wonderkid" Louie Barry.

zh.title: 路易·巴里 - 从巴塞罗那到温布利的九次租借之旅
zh.summary: "神童"路易·巴里的职业生涯从巴塞罗那出发，经历九次租借，最终第二次出现在温布利决赛舞台。他的故事说明了现代足球中年轻人才的不可预测发展道路。

title: Celtic face European competition for Hibs midfielder Chaiwa - gossip
summary: Celtic are continuing their pursuit of Hibernian midfielder Chaiwa in the transfer market, while pundit Paul Dickov believes a Rangers return would benefit Scotland defender Nathan Patterson. The gossip highlights ongoing speculation in the Scottish transfer window.
content: Celtic continue to pursue Hibs midfielder, while Paul Dickov believes a return to Rangers would benefit Scotland defender Nathan Patterson.

zh.title: 凯尔特人面临欧洲竞争争夺希伯尼安中场柴瓦 - 转会花边
zh.summary: 凯尔特人继续在转会市场追求希伯尼安中场球员柴瓦，评论员保罗·迪科夫认为回归流浪者队将有益于苏格兰后卫内森·帕特森。这则花边新闻突出了苏格兰转会窗口期间的持续猜测。

title: More than the Score
summary: The article examines how caretaker managers like Michael Carrick and McFarlane navigate the unique challenges of temporary leadership roles. Their experiences shed light on the pressures and responsibilities of managing without long-term job security.
content: How the likes of Carrick and McFarlane manage on a caretaker basis

zh.title: 比分之外
zh.summary: 文章探讨了迈克尔·卡里克等临时主教练如何应对临时领导角色的独特挑战。他们的经历揭示了在没有长期工作保障情况下进行管理的压力和责任。

title: Captain Gyokeres for a Burnley bonanza - FPL team of the week
summary: Fantasy Premier League analysis recommends Arsenal attacking assets for their home match against Burnley, with Captain Gyokeres identified as a key late-season fantasy option.
content: Arsenal's home game against Burnley is the perfect opportunity to capture a late-season FPL haul - but which attacking asset should you pick?

zh.title: 队长久克雷斯对阵伯恩利的大丰收 - FPL本周最佳球队
zh.summary: 幻想超级联赛分析建议为对阵伯恩利的主场比赛选择阿森纳进攻球员，队长久克雷斯被认为是赛季末期的关键幻想选择。

title: Fifa risking player safety over heat at World Cup - scientists
summary: Scientists warn that FIFA's heat safety measures for the 2026 World Cup are inadequate and could seriously endanger player health. The protocols are criticized as insufficient for extreme temperature conditions.
content: A group of world-leading scientists warn Fifa its current heat safety measures for the men's 2026 World Cup are "inadequate" and could put players at risk of serious harm.

zh.title: 国际足联因世界杯高温冒着球员安全风险 - 科学家警告
zh.summary: 科学家警告，国际足联为2026年世界杯制定的热安全措施不足，可能会严重危害球员健康。这些协议因对极端温度条件准备不充分而受到批评。

title: Penalty pandemonium sets up Hearts & Celtic showdown for the ages
summary: A dramatic Scottish Cup match featuring controversial penalties leaves Hearts in control of their own destiny. Only Celtic stands between Hearts and progression in a crucial showdown.
content: On a night of bewilderment, there was one unarguable truth. Hearts still have this in their own hands. Only Celtic can stop them, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 点球混乱为哈茨与凯尔特人的经典对决铺路
zh.summary: 一场包含有争议点球的苏格兰杯戏剧性比赛让哈茨掌控自己的命运。只有凯尔特人阻碍哈茨晋级这一关键对决。

title: US drops $15,000 visa deposit for foreign fans with World Cup tickets
summary: The US has eliminated a $15,000 visa deposit requirement for foreign World Cup fans, reversing a controversial policy tied to crackdowns on visa overstays.
content: Fifty countries, including five that have qualified for the World Cup, are subject to the bond requirement as part of Trump's crackdown on visa overstays.

zh.title: 美国取消对持世界杯门票外国粉丝的15000美元签证保证金
zh.summary: 美国已消除对外国世界杯粉丝的15000美元签证保证金要求，推翻了与严厉打击签证逾期相关的有争议政策。
